pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Applied Analytics & BI KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.407) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Strategy and Operations. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Strategy and Operations roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Applied Analytics & BI is not a standard competency expectation for VP Data Strategy and Operations. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP Data Strategy and Operations competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.407) and edge-domain placement (Applied Analytics & BI) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP Data Strategy and Operations. All passes support exclusion.
